problem id: 1da4f2db
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00111110 -> 00011111
  00010101 -> 10001010
  11011110 -> 01101111
  00101010 -> 00010101
  10110000 -> 01011000
  01110100 -> 00111010
  10001111 -> 00000111
  01110000 -> 00111000
  01110110 -> 00111011

query: 11001110
predicted answer: 01100111
